---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Affected Crate(s)

Which crate(s) would this change touch?

- [ ] plumbum-core (parsers, features)
- [ ] plumbum-score (weights, scoring)
- [ ] plumbum-store (SQLite, queries)
- [ ] plumbum-config (configuration)
- [ ] plumbum-cli (commands)
- [ ] plumbum-tui (dashboard)
- [ ] plumbum-mcp (MCP server)

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
